description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that triggers on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test against Python 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12. The job should check out the repository, set up Python with the current matrix version, install dependencies, clone the notmuch repository, build and install notmuch, install Python bindings, and then run tests with unittest while skipping certain broken tests in CI.
